title: McCormick: Still Sitting On The Sidelines
text: McCormick is a Dividend Champion with 36 consecutive years of dividend growth.  Shares currently offer a dividend yield of 1.80%. McCormick offers any kind of flavor solution for consumer whether they are at home or on the go.

title: Pessimism Surrounding Overvalued Food Stock Could Unwind
text: McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE:MKC) is an American food company that manufactures, markets, and distributes spices, seasoning mixes, condiments, and other flavoring products to the entire food industry including e-commerce channels, grocery, food manufacturers, and foodservice businesses.

title: After Bland Results, Is McCormick Stock Still a Spicy Pick?
text: Short-term headwinds shouldn't distract investors from the long-term strength of this company.
